footer_address: Address: 1201, 12F, City Airport Tower, 36, Teheran-ro 87-gil, Gangnam-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea, 06164
index_video_title:
Use Deleo’s platform
technology to make global
logistics easier than ever
index_about_deleo_content:
Connecting your business to the world — safely and swiftly
With smart logistics technology and a global network, Deleo provide seamless and efficient logistics solutions worldwide
index_our_service_content: One click to complete global logistics — Deleo
index_our_service_kp_text: Book, Pay and Ship -  all made easy with Kakao Pay, domestic and international
index_our_service_ship_text: no extra charges, no item details required — enjoy simple and effortless international shipping
index_our_service_one_text: A seamless fulfillment solution for e-commerce businesses — simplifying global sales and inventory management
index_our_service_bob_text:
From order to delivery
The fastest and safest way to deliver K-items worldwide
index_our_service_nex_text: Next-generation integrated logistics SaaS for global e-commerce
index_philosophy_content: Innovation in logistics, powered by technology and trust — that’s the philosophy of Deleo
index_philosophy_item_p_smart: Manage global shipping with just a few clicks
index_philosophy_item_p_transparent: Share the entire logistics process in real time
index_philosophy_item_p_collaborative: Grow together with our partners, creating new value for the future
index_philosophy_item_p_global: Provide accurate and predictable logistics experiences across borders
index_philosophy_item_p_data: Through integrated data, we build a more efficient logistics flow
index_our_partners_content: Leading global carriers around the world partner with Deleo
about_us_hero_title: Connecting Hearts Through Technology — Pioneering a New Era of Global Logistics
about_us_hero_sub_title: Deleo is a smart logistics platform that connects the world as one
about_us_vision_desc_text:
Deleo collaborates with global logistics partners to create an integrated ecosystem
that delivers efficient and seamless logistics services worldwide
about_us_mission_sub_text_discover_sub_t: Discovering logistics partners across the globe
about_us_mission_sub_text_discover_conte: From first-mile to last-mile, Deleo connects top partners across the entire global logistics value chain — including fulfillment, customs, settlement, and international delivery. Together, these partnerships form an integrated platform-driven ecosystem built on expertise and collaboration.
about_us_mission_sub_text_connect_sub_ti: Connecting the World Through Our Platform
about_us_mission_sub_text_connect_conten: Deleo bridges e-commerce businesses and customers, people and people, brands and influencers, and enterprises and global markets — all on one open logistics platform. Our open logistics system transcends distance and borders, connecting every opportunity across the globe.
about_us_mission_sub_text_maximize_conte: Through real-time integrations with global couriers, postal networks, KakaoPay, and Lotte Global Logistics, Deleo offers customers a broader range of options and greater flexibility. Our adaptive solutions help businesses focus on growth while we handle logistics complexity.
about_us_mission_sub_text_share_sub_titl: A Shared-Economy Platform for Sustainable Growth
about_us_mission_sub_text_share_content: Deleo strives to build a collaborative and sustainable logistics ecosystem, sharing infrastructure and opportunities rather than competing. Beyond borders, we are expanding into limitless global markets through partnership and innovation.
about_us_why_content: Deleo’s strength lies in solving the complexities of global logistics through technology and a user-centric philosophy.
about_us_why_card1_back_p:
With NDP (Deleo’s All-in-One Platform), we automate every step from order aggregation to delivery, customs, inventory, and settlement.
All processes are transparent and traceable in real time, providing complete visibility.
about_us_why_card2_back_p: We build every service around a true customer-centric perspective. We deliver tailored logistics solutions optimized for every client’s business model.
about_us_why_card3_back_p: We proactively monitor logistics flows to prevent disruptions. Our predictive system ensures seamless operations and uninterrupted business flow.
about_us_why_bottom_text: Driven by convenience, integrity, and global connectivity, Deleo is building the world’s most reliable and intelligent logistics ecosystem—empowering our clients to focus on growth.
about_us_identity_content: The Deleo logo embodies professionalism and reliability as a global logistics leader
about_us_identity_text1: More than a symbol, it reflects our vision to simplify complex logistics through technology
about_us_identity_text2: The vibrant cyan color represents youth and innovation, while the refined wordmark conveys trust and technological excellence
about_us_identity_text3: The logo type may only be used in the colors specified below. We recommend using the primary turquoise logo and do not recommend using a gray background. When applying the logo, ensure sufficient visibility depending on the background color and brightness.
kakaopay_hero_title:
From Korea to the World -
with Just Kakao Pay!
kakaopay_at_a_glance_content: Send packages domestically or internationally, all within Kakao Pay
kakaopay_at_a_glance_item_content4: Done! Your shipment is on its way
kakaopay_is_international_content: No paperwork, no hassle — send your packages abroad right from home
kakaopay_is_international_item1: simple shippin with Kakao Pay — from request to delivery
kakaopay_is_international_merit1_1: Simply enter the recipient’s address and finish your request in under a minute
kakaopay_is_international_merit1_2: Submit your request, leave it at your door, and we’ll pick it up. No heavy lifting required
kakaopay_is_international_merit1_3: No need to fill out a long or complicated item list. We prepare everything automatically for you
kakaopay_is_international_item2: Safe and reliable at every step, From start to finish
kakaopay_is_international_merit2_1: You can view the entire packing and shipping-prep process for your item through video
kakaopay_is_international_merit2_2: From Korea to your final destination, get real-time updates in KakaoTalk
kakaopay_is_international_merit2_3: With professional inspection and secure repackaging to keep your items safe during delivery
kakaopay_is_international_merit3_1: Working with multiple partners to provide efficient routes and affordable shipping rates for each country
kakaopay_is_international_merit3_2: Enjoy premium-quality service at a reasonable price
kakaopay_is_international_merit3_3: Repacked at no extra cost with durable boxes suitable for international shipping
kakaopay_is_international_item4: Expert Support Every Step of the Way
kakaopay_is_international_merit4_1: Complicated HS code input and customs documentation are fully handled by our logistics experts
kakaopay_is_international_merit4_2: Prohibited or restricted items are carefully screened in advance to prevent shipping failures
kakaopay_is_international_merit4_3: Our customs specialists review your shipment ahead of time to avoid unexpected clearance issues
kakaopay_is_domestic_content: At home or away, send packages easily with just Kakao Pay
kakaopay_is_domestic_item1: From home with doorstep pickup, or from your nearest convenience store
kakaopay_is_domestic_merit1_1: If you’re busy, schedule a home pickup on the date that suits you best
kakaopay_is_domestic_merit1_2: Simply drop it off anytime at a nearby 24-hour convenience store
kakaopay_is_domestic_item2: No App Needed — All in Kakao Pay
kakaopay_is_domestic_merit2_1: No downloads, no tedious sign-ups required Book, pay, and confirm your shipment with just a few taps in Kakao Pay
kakaopay_is_domestic_item3: Send Without Knowing the Recipient’s Address
kakaopay_is_domestic_merit3_1: Request the delivery address via KakaoTalk — the recipient fills it in directly
kakaopay_is_domestic_merit3_2: Always Ship safely to the exact address with no worries about incorrect information
kakaopay_bottom_link:
Ready for simple global delivery?
Start with Kakao Pay!
ship_hero_title: A Smarter, Simpler Way to Ship Overseas
ship_hero_under: Send your love and essentials safely — to family and friends around the world.
ship_bg_in_banner_text:
Now, Just prepare the items.
From pickup and packing to customs and final delivery, EasyShip handles every step of international shipping for you.
ship_target_audience_item1: Students abroad who want heavy books or daily essentials delivered with ease
ship_target_audience_item2: Anyone sending Korean foods or cosmetics to family and friends overseas
ship_target_audience_item3: Shippers who regularly send small personal items abroad
ship_exclusive_service_item1_1: Just Enter the Number of Boxes
ship_exclusive_service_item1_2: Simply enter how many boxes you’re sending — no need to fill out complex forms. Our logistics experts take care of item lists and HS code classification for you.
ship_exclusive_service_item2_2: Deleo’s global partner network automatically finds the best rate and route for your shipment. Enjoy a reliable, cost-efficient delivery service every time.
ship_exclusive_service_item3_2: There are no extra charges like remote-area fees or fuel surcharges.
ship_exclusive_service_item4_2: Choose your preferred pickup date — our courier will collect your boxes right from your door for free.
ship_end_to_end_text: We Handle Everything — From Start to Finish
ship_end_to_end_item1_2: We carefully pack every item to ensure safe arrival
ship_end_to_end_item2_2: Coverage for any unexpected delivery incidents
ship_end_to_end_item3_2: Watch the full packing process from our logistics center via Recording
ship_customer_review_item1_1: Review from a Customer in Canada
ship_customer_review_item1_2: Shipbaesong is cheaper and more convenient than EMS!
ship_customer_review_item1_3: "Shipbaesong is cheaper and more convenient than EMS!" When using the post office, I had to list every item myself, but Shipbaesong took care of all the details and even inspected each product carefully. Tracking was automatic, and the customer service was incredibly kind — it made the whole process so easy and comfortable.
ship_customer_review_item2_1: Review from a Customer Who Sent a Parcel to a Friend in Australia
ship_customer_review_item2_2: Guided me through every step on KakaoTalk
ship_customer_review_item2_3: It was my first time sending an international package, but Shipbaesong guided me through every step on KakaoTalk. From packing to customs, they kept me updated the entire way, and the parcel arrived safely in Australia. My friend there was amazed at how fast Korean shipping is.
ship_customer_review_item3_1: Review from a Working Professional Living in London
ship_customer_review_item3_2: The best part was not having to carry anything
ship_customer_review_item3_3: The best part was not having to carry anything—Shipbaesong picked up the box from my home in Korea and delivered it straight to my place in the UK. I sent it on August 19 and it arrived by September 1, which is incredibly fast. I’ll definitely keep using Shipbaesong.
ship_partners_content: We work with trusted logistics partners around the world to provide faster, safer delivery experiences
one_hero_title: From Order to Inventory Management, Through Overseas Customs Clearance and Final Delivery — One Platform, One Solution: ONE-Express
one_waste_time_text: Are You Struggling with These Common E-Commerce Challenges?
one_waste_time_item1: Are you tired of collecting orders manually from multiple online stores?
one_waste_time_item2: Are customs paperwork and export/import documentation overwhelming?
one_waste_time_item3: Do inaccurate inventory levels delay your order processing?
one_waste_time_item4: Want to expand globally even with a small product lineup?
one_bg_in_banner_text2: One-Express is a cross-border e-commerce logistics platform that simplifies every step of your global business operations.
one_click_order_management_text: Manage All Orders Across Multiple Sales Channels in One Click
one_click_order_management_content: One-Express helps you save valuable time by automating repetitive logistics tasks.
one_click_order_management_item1_2: Cafe24, Shopify, Amazon<small class="fs-m-12 fs-p-12">(coming soon)</small>, and TikTok Shop<small class="fs-m-12 fs-p-12">(coming soon)</small>.
one_click_order_management_item2_2: manage invoices and shipping requests with a single click.
few_clicks_global_text: Expand Your Business Globally — With Just a Few Clicks
few_clicks_global_content: Cross-border logistics are complex — One-Express makes it effortless.
few_clicks_global_item1_2: export/import papers generated and filed automatically.
few_clicks_global_item3_2: choose the fastest and most cost-efficient delivery option.
few_clicks_global_item4_2: with global logistics leaders such as FedEx and UPS.
business_type_shipping_text: Flexible Shipping Solutions for Businesses of All Kind
business_type_shipping_content: Deleo offers tailored logistics services, not one-size-fits-all solutions.
business_type_shipping_item1_2: Businesses with in-house warehouse and inventory systems seeking a specialized partner to outsource only their delivery operations.
business_type_shipping_item1_3: ✓ Maintain your existing infrastructure while leveraging Deleo’s global logistics network.
business_type_shipping_item1_4: ✓ Cost-effective global shipping, no fulfillment contract required.
business_type_shipping_item2_2: For solo entrepreneurs and small-scale e-commerce brands that want to hand off logistics end-to-end and concentrate on growing their business.
business_type_shipping_item2_3: ✓ End-to-end logistics management from inbound inspection and storage to inventory control, packaging, and dispatch.
business_type_shipping_item2_4: ✓ A robust management system that resolves misdelivery issues and ensures accurate inventory tracking.
free_setup_text: No Setup Fees — Start Global Shipping with Zero Risk
free_setup_content:
Get started in the global market with no upfront cost.
Deleo supports your smooth and scalable international growth.
From marketplace integration to optimized warehousing, expand globally — with no setup fees.
one_recommendation_item1: Solo sellers running global online stores
one_recommendation_item2: Small and mid-size brands operating on Qoo10, Amazon, or Shopify
one_recommendation_item3: Sellers based in Korea who want to reach global customers
one_partners_content: We work with trusted logistics partners around the world to provide faster, safer delivery experiences
bob_hero_under: Box o’ Bliss is a global commerce platform based on professional curation by local Korean MDs, delivering trusted K-brands and products swiftly and reliably to consumers worldwide.
bob_bg_in_banner_text1: Beyond product distribution, we accelerate the global expansion of Korean brands while creating new sales opportunities within the domestic market.
core-competency_item1_2: We curate products that reflect Korean market trends and consumer insights, selecting items best suited for both global and domestic demand.
core-competency_item2_2: Through local fulfillment, direct delivery, and global logistics partnerships, we operate a stable and efficient distribution network.
core-competency_item3_2: We empower partners through influencer collaborations, group-buying models, and other data-driven digital marketing strategies.
core-competency_item4_2: With secure international payment systems, customer support channels, and campaign management tools, we ensure a reliable B2B operating environment.
bob_business_area_item_text1_1: Operating global channels such as Box o’ Bliss and Amazon,
bob_business_area_item_text1_2: we support brand expansion through both direct purchase and consignment models.
bob_business_area_item_text2_1: We supply wholesale products to international retailers and online sellers.
bob_business_area_item_text2_2: We help Korean manufacturers establish export channels and long-term partnerships.
bob_business_area_item_text3_1: We operate influencer-led group-buying and direct-to-consumer sales models.
bob_business_area_item_text3_2: In Korea, we connect consumers with local K-brands, while abroad, we expand their reach to global audiences.
bob_business_area_item_text3_3: We also provide influencer-driven content creation and branded PPL advertising.
collaboration_item1_2: We provide instant sales pathways for brands seeking global expansion.
collaboration_item1_3: From operations to logistics, we offer a complete end-to-end solution.
collaboration_item2_2: We drive direct sales through influencer group-buying campaigns in Korea.
collaboration_item2_3: Through overseas influencer collaborations, we boost both brand awareness and revenue growth globally.
bob_recommendation_item1: Companies needing logistics or operational partners for global sales
bob_recommendation_item2: Brands seeking new growth opportunities through overseas expansion
bob_recommendation_item3: Brands aiming to boost sales through influencer marketing and group-buying models
bob_bottom_link2_1: Please contact us at [contact@boxobliss.com] to discuss partnership opportunities.
